title: Throgy's Addon
description: This project adds many amazing characters from the marvel franchise that are either new or remade great versions.
body:
This mod currently contains these following powers:

-Dr. Doom (Advanced armor)

-Knull

-Galactus (Not obtainable in survival)

-Stark tech symbiote

-Iron Fist

-Throg

-Venom

-Anti-Venom

-Agent-Venom

-Martial arts (animated enhanced combat)

-Sorcery

-Carnage

-Spider-Man

-Symbiote suit

-Green Goblin

 

 

Dependencies Required: 

Palladium
KubeJS
Curios API (Forge/NeoForge)
Pehkui
GeckoLib
Packet Fixer
Pantheon Sent



Main designer: [Father] Khimsky

Icon made by: Aliejar

 

Official discord: https://discord.gg/4fZPCR9FDv
